title: slew2

flags.name: -rate <float>
flags.description:
sets refresh rate in ms (minimum 1)
default: 5

methods.description: sets new start point and goes back to target

body: [slew2] is a slew limiter like [slew], but has a different speed for up and down changes. It takes an amplitude limit per second and an incoming value to be 'slew limited'. It then generates a line towards the incoming value. The difference between [slew] and [line] is that [slew] has a fixed speed, not a fixed period. A limit of zero stops the line generation and a negative value turns the limiter off.
